email.subject: Hey Gray — everything okay?
email.body:
Just checking in.

Hey Gray,




I noticed you cancelled your GenHQ membership. I’m not going to pretend I’m not bummed — but more than anything, I just want to
understand.




Was it something specific? Did you feel stuck? Did life just get busy? Was it a budget thing?




I’m asking because I actually read these replies. If something about GenHQ wasn’t working for you, I want to know. And if it’s
something we can fix, I’d love the chance to.




You still have access for the rest of your billing period, so nothing changes right now. But if there’s a conversation to have,
I’d rather have it while you’re still here than after you’re gone.




Just hit reply. Even one sentence helps.




Rourke


If you no longer wish to receive these emails you may unsubscribe
[https://email.mail.genhq.io/c/eJxsk81y6jgUhJ9G3pmSJVu2F16QMCbAJQEChMyGkiUZK9iSI8nm5-mnIHfuZKqyPaXTrdNfNdtLnuWsXV3y7gWOcRQ94DWcnJcez1ggQlx6XDdUqqyhsh4chKo-B1L_Hu71SQljK9nu3aUVWa0ZdVJ_zbknsiCOcYhhlBBP3AT2jbCWHsTN9W36-mvLUDftqjQ8XxZX4djvV3exkzbHstanb7PbWshZQQPBfZKS1A9Tkfg0LKnPGKFBWrAoSsLvK9aJ9t-9gAvoBywp_DApmU8phn7JKMScQMwR84TqpdGqEcplrdG8Y7dzvCorYMzjEiUYFiwpwxIRymKYEsoIT2IYezJDEBGIAxykmCAyiBIYUpZAwkJMMeEghP-PsM4q51oL8BCgHKDcCtNLJuygsQeruBkw3QCU30-xAOVFJ2suDEB5p2xXWGZkIfxeihNA-V9jFm2uj0Q0kL0t2e5d8R1AeZq8JcNfU8yeN-NzPbvOh0oC_KUJ8Ohg6IXTXlqMAYpCeLj_8O5L_iMF8OgnVgARJ5tbwLRpAR79YR3FQeDVbP8FQSonjKJ1tkG55ePtcRcA9EB2YpnU5xe9K-fzbXWyh0qpflZ_xlVf8tNsSAuA8o8VIfNJlbr-efE-FJ-Tdkne27WMbrnwJzUZdktldptpuE6e8hxtXYV7ddw8JpfxasRiHpupDa_6dT4O0_msn7PS6uB5l0y3b3Vsn89n1SW7j3W5dop38d8A5a8bq18-Wjg_qMtEJcEwnx1fj_lKEgfQw26Rzoyoo03zVAQvZ2kfR0_bxePHahFd9bprcdPPzLSqFmQarfI0ngM88mp9b9lPiLxGuErzjLbSa43uJRcmqwXlTCslmNPGM9l3St8YeVZ3honsHrMvbe_fGiOM52493P9o5zKmm_2PfXeZcPs_nesz9E8AAAD__5m6YLU]

19ce8b33f6e0b40e.draft:
Hey Rourke,

Honestly it was just a budget thing — nothing bad to say about GenHQ at all. I appreciated everything in the membership, the timing just wasn't right for me financially.

Thanks for reaching out personally though, that means a lot.

Gray
